channel.title: MikeCast — Daily Briefing
channel.description: Your daily AI-powered news briefing. Personalized news across AI & Tech, Business & Markets, Companies, and NY Sports.
channel.itunes:author: MikeCast

item.title: MikeCast #12 — March 06, 2026
item.description: Episode #12 — The financial landscape remains volatile as weak jobs data compounds the economic uncertainty fueled by Middle East tensions, impacting both stock markets and oil prices. Meanwhile, tech giants like SoftBank and Google make headlines with major financial maneuvers and controversial AI developments. In sports, New York teams are making strategic moves with the Yankees eyeing high-profile signings and the Giants actively pursuing new talent.
item.itunes:title: MikeCast #12 — March 06, 2026
item.itunes:subtitle: Episode #12 — The financial landscape remains volatile as weak jobs data compounds the economic uncertainty fueled by Middle East tensions, impacting both stock markets and oil prices. Meanwhile, tech giants like SoftBank and Google make headlines with...
item.itunes:summary: Episode #12 — The financial landscape remains volatile as weak jobs data compounds the economic uncertainty fueled by Middle East tensions, impacting both stock markets and oil prices. Meanwhile, tech giants like SoftBank and Google make headlines with major financial maneuvers and controversial AI developments. In sports, New York teams are making strategic moves with the Yankees eyeing high-profile signings and the Giants actively pursuing new talent.

item.title: MikeCast #11 — March 05, 2026
item.description: Episode #11 — OpenAI's rapid advancements with GPT-5.4 highlight the ongoing race in AI capabilities, while controversy brews over military applications. Market volatility persists amid geopolitical tensions, with oil prices surging due to the Iran conflict. Major firms like Google and Amazon face significant operational and legal challenges, underlining the dynamic landscape of tech and business.
item.itunes:title: MikeCast #11 — March 05, 2026
item.itunes:subtitle: Episode #11 — OpenAI's rapid advancements with GPT-5.4 highlight the ongoing race in AI capabilities, while controversy brews over military applications. Market volatility persists amid geopolitical tensions, with oil prices surging due to the Iran con...
item.itunes:summary: Episode #11 — OpenAI's rapid advancements with GPT-5.4 highlight the ongoing race in AI capabilities, while controversy brews over military applications. Market volatility persists amid geopolitical tensions, with oil prices surging due to the Iran conflict. Major firms like Google and Amazon face significant operational and legal challenges, underlining the dynamic landscape of tech and business.

item.title: MikeCast #10 — March 04, 2026
item.description: Episode #10 — Today's headlines are dominated by strategic shifts and settlements in the tech industry, with Google and Epic Games resolving their long-standing app store dispute, leading to a significant reduction in commission rates. In business, AI infrastructure spending is surging, reflecting the sector's growing importance. Meanwhile, Amazon and Apple unveil innovations that could reshape their market positions. In sports, the Yankees gear up for the season with promising performances and strategic considerations.
item.itunes:title: MikeCast #10 — March 04, 2026
item.itunes:subtitle: Episode #10 — Today's headlines are dominated by strategic shifts and settlements in the tech industry, with Google and Epic Games resolving their long-standing app store dispute, leading to a significant reduction in commission rates. In business, AI ...
item.itunes:summary: Episode #10 — Today's headlines are dominated by strategic shifts and settlements in the tech industry, with Google and Epic Games resolving their long-standing app store dispute, leading to a significant reduction in commission rates. In business, AI infrastructure spending is surging, reflecting the sector's growing importance. Meanwhile, Amazon and Apple unveil innovations that could reshape their market positions. In sports, the Yankees gear up for the season with promising performances and strategic considerations.

item.title: MikeCast #9 — March 03, 2026
item.description: Episode #9 — Today's headlines highlight the intensifying conflict in the Middle East, its economic repercussions, and significant technological advancements. Automakers face the challenge of adapting to electric and autonomous vehicle trends, while the global economy braces for shocks from geopolitical tensions. Meanwhile, Apple and Amazon navigate new product launches and operational disruptions, respectively.
item.itunes:title: MikeCast #9 — March 03, 2026
item.itunes:subtitle: Episode #9 — Today's headlines highlight the intensifying conflict in the Middle East, its economic repercussions, and significant technological advancements. Automakers face the challenge of adapting to electric and autonomous vehicle trends, while th...
item.itunes:summary: Episode #9 — Today's headlines highlight the intensifying conflict in the Middle East, its economic repercussions, and significant technological advancements. Automakers face the challenge of adapting to electric and autonomous vehicle trends, while the global economy braces for shocks from geopolitical tensions. Meanwhile, Apple and Amazon navigate new product launches and operational disruptions, respectively.

item.title: MikeCast #8 — March 02, 2026
item.description: Episode #8 — Today's news is dominated by escalating tensions in the Middle East as the U.S. commits more troops to Iran, influencing both global politics and markets. In tech, the Pentagon strengthens its ties with innovators, while Apple pushes forward with new product releases. Meanwhile, the rising cost of energy and shifts in U.S. political strategies offer a glimpse into the evolving landscape of business and governance.
item.itunes:title: MikeCast #8 — March 02, 2026
item.itunes:subtitle: Episode #8 — Today's news is dominated by escalating tensions in the Middle East as the U.S. commits more troops to Iran, influencing both global politics and markets. In tech, the Pentagon strengthens its ties with innovators, while Apple pushes forwa...
item.itunes:summary: Episode #8 — Today's news is dominated by escalating tensions in the Middle East as the U.S. commits more troops to Iran, influencing both global politics and markets. In tech, the Pentagon strengthens its ties with innovators, while Apple pushes forward with new product releases. Meanwhile, the rising cost of energy and shifts in U.S. political strategies offer a glimpse into the evolving landscape of business and governance.

item.title: MikeCast #7 — March 01, 2026
item.description: Episode #7 — Today's landscape is marked by geopolitical upheavals and technological shifts. The assassination of key Iranian leaders, following a collaborative intelligence effort between the U.S. and Israel, is shaking global politics and regional stability. Meanwhile, the tech world is witnessing intriguing shifts with a nostalgic return to the iPod and strategic moves at the Pentagon involving OpenAI. In business, remote work innovations and the impact of geopolitical events on oil markets are in focus.
item.itunes:title: MikeCast #7 — March 01, 2026
item.itunes:subtitle: Episode #7 — Today's landscape is marked by geopolitical upheavals and technological shifts. The assassination of key Iranian leaders, following a collaborative intelligence effort between the U.S. and Israel, is shaking global politics and regional st...

The assassination of key Iranian leaders, following a collaborative intelligence effort between the U.S. and Israel, is shaking global politics and regional stability. Meanwhile, the tech world is witnessing intriguing shifts with a nostalgic return to the iPod and strategic moves at the Pentagon involving OpenAI. In business, remote work innovations and the impact of geopolitical events on oil markets are in focus.

item.title: MikeCast #6 — February 28, 2026
item.description: Episode #6 — Today's news highlights significant tensions in technology and geopolitics. The tech industry's clash with President Trump over AI usage underscores a pivotal moment for AI's role in national security. Simultaneously, U.S.-Iran tensions escalate dramatically with coordinated airstrikes by the U.S. and Israel, marking a critical juncture in international relations.
item.itunes:title: MikeCast #6 — February 28, 2026
item.itunes:subtitle: Episode #6 — Today's news highlights significant tensions in technology and geopolitics. The tech industry's clash with President Trump over AI usage underscores a pivotal moment for AI's role in national security. Simultaneously, U.S.-Iran tensions es...
item.itunes:summary: Episode #6 — Today's news highlights significant tensions in technology and geopolitics. The tech industry's clash with President Trump over AI usage underscores a pivotal moment for AI's role in national security. Simultaneously, U.S.-Iran tensions escalate dramatically with coordinated airstrikes by the U.S. and Israel, marking a critical juncture in international relations.

item.title: MikeCast #5 — February 27, 2026
item.description: Episode #5 — Today's news highlights significant geopolitical and technological shifts. Donald Trump's foreign policy strategies raise global tensions, particularly with Iran, while Elon Musk's vision of a "sustainable abundance" challenges economic norms. Meanwhile, AI's impact on traditional industries, from India's tech sector to the global 3-D printing market, continues to reshape business landscapes.
item.itunes:title: MikeCast #5 — February 27, 2026
item.itunes:subtitle: Episode #5 — Today's news highlights significant geopolitical and technological shifts. Donald Trump's foreign policy strategies raise global tensions, particularly with Iran, while Elon Musk's vision of a "sustainable abundance" challenges economic no...
item.itunes:summary: Episode #5 — Today's news highlights significant geopolitical and technological shifts. Donald Trump's foreign policy strategies raise global tensions, particularly with Iran, while Elon Musk's vision of a "sustainable abundance" challenges economic norms. Meanwhile, AI's impact on traditional industries, from India's tech sector to the global 3-D printing market, continues to reshape business landscapes.

item.title: MikeCast #4 — February 26, 2026
item.description: Episode #4 — In the tech world, Nvidia's remarkable financial performance and the pervasive influence of artificial intelligence are major highlights. The geopolitical landscape is tense with U.S.-Iran relations on edge, while Trump's policy maneuvers continue to stir domestic and economic discussions. In business, companies like Aston Martin are grappling with tariff impacts, and Meta's strategic partnerships underline the evolving AI infrastructure landscape.

The geopolitical landscape is tense with U.S.-Iran relations on edge, while Trump's policy maneuvers continue to stir domestic and economic discussions. In business, companies like Aston Martin are grappling with tariff impacts, and Meta's strategic partnerships underline the evolving AI infrastructure landscape.

item.title: MikeCast #3 — February 25, 2026
item.description: Episode #3 — Today’s news highlights the evolving landscape of AI and tech, with Netflix diversifying into podcasts and Wayve securing a major investment for autonomous vehicles. In business, debates swirl around AI's economic impact, while geopolitical tensions continue to shape energy markets. In the corporate world, Apple's new App Store requirements and Meta's major partnership with AMD are in focus. Meanwhile, New York sports teams are navigating roster challenges and player performances.

In business, debates swirl around AI's economic impact, while geopolitical tensions continue to shape energy markets. In the corporate world, Apple's new App Store requirements and Meta's major partnership with AMD are in focus. Meanwhile, New York sports teams are navigating roster challenges and player performances.

item.title: MikeCast #2 — February 24, 2026
item.description: Episode #2 — In today's briefing, the tech industry faces scrutiny as revelations about Jeffrey Epstein's ties to Microsoft surface, while OpenAI expands its enterprise reach through new partnerships. Meanwhile, the business landscape is shifting with regulatory pressures on unemployment benefits and significant investments in healthcare innovation. On the companies front, Apple's manufacturing plans mark a strategic shift, and Facebook faces internal criticism over its encryption policies. In sports, New York teams are making headlines, with impressive performances from the Yankees and updates on the Knicks and Devils.

item.itunes:summary: Episode #2 — In today's briefing, the tech industry faces scrutiny as revelations about Jeffrey Epstein's ties to Microsoft surface, while OpenAI expands its enterprise reach through new partnerships. Meanwhile, the business landscape is shifting with regulatory pressures on unemployment benefits and significant investments in healthcare innovation. On the companies front, Apple's manufacturing plans mark a strategic shift, and Facebook faces internal criticism over its encryption policies. In sports, New York teams are making headlines, with impressive performances from the Yankees and updates on the Knicks and Devils.

item.title: MikeCast #1 — February 23, 2026
item.description: Episode #1 — Today’s news highlights the ongoing challenges and innovations in technology and business. Chinese AI firms are reportedly using data from Anthropic's Claude to enhance their own AI models, reflecting global competition in AI development. Meanwhile, U.S. financial markets experience volatility with a significant drop in the Dow, and Tesla faces scrutiny over data transparency. In sports, Olympic gold medalist Jack Hughes' return generates excitement among New Jersey Devils fans.

item.itunes:subtitle: Episode #1 — Today’s news highlights the ongoing challenges and innovations in technology and business. Chinese AI firms are reportedly using data from Anthropic's Claude to enhance their own AI models, reflecting global competition in AI development. ...

Chinese AI firms are reportedly using data from Anthropic's Claude to enhance their own AI models, reflecting global competition in AI development. Meanwhile, U.S. financial markets experience volatility with a significant drop in the Dow, and Tesla faces scrutiny over data transparency. In sports, Olympic gold medalist Jack Hughes' return generates excitement among New Jersey Devils fans.
